matcher_value: $f=Get-CimInstance Win32_Fan -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $e=Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System';StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-30);Level=@(1,2,3)} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Message -match '(?i)\bfan\b|fan fail|cooling|thermal|overheat|fan speed too low|failure detected' }; $result=[ordered]@{FanDataExposed=[bool]$f; EventDataExposed=[bool]$e; Fans=@($f | Select-Object Name,Status,DesiredSpeed,VariableSpeed,Availability,ConfigManagerErrorCode); Events=@($e | Select-Object -First 50 TimeCreated,ProviderName,Id,LevelDisplayName,@{N='Message';E={($_.Message -replace '\r?\n',' ')}})}; $result | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4
